channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Takeaways from the AP's investigation into Osprey safety issues
item.description: After being grounded for months following a crash last November that killed eight service members in Japan, the V-22 Osprey — a complicated aircraft that flies fast like a plane but converts to land like a helicopter — is back in the air. But there are still questions as to whether it should be.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, KEVIN VINEYS and AARON KESSLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden seeks nearly $100 billion in emergency disaster aid after Hurricanes Helene and Milton
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden is requesting nearly $100 billion in emergency disaster aid after Hurricanes Helene and Milton, and other natural disasters, telling lawmakers that the money is “urgently needed.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top Democrat on House Ethics panel says Gaetz report should be released
item.description: Rep. Susan Wild (D-Pa.), the top Democrat on the House Ethics Committee, said she thinks the panel’s report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) should be released.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump could 'revoke' China's free trade designation: Moolenaar
item.description: Moolenaar said tightening China's trade capabilities is "in line" with the president-elect's thinking.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia appeals court cancels arguments in Trump's bid to disqualify Fani Willis
item.description: A Georgia appeals court canceled next month’s oral arguments in President-elect Trump’s bid to disqualify Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis (D) from criminally prosecuting him. Monday's one-sentence order from the Georgia Court of Appeals canceling the Dec.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he is naming former Wisconsin Rep. Sean Duffy to be transportation secretary
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says former Wisconsin Rep. Sean Duffy is his choice to be transportation secretary as he continues to roll out picks for his Cabinet.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump campaign official says Pennsylvania Dems will face jail time over ballot recount
item.description: Trump campaign official Chris LaCivita said Democratic Pennsylvania commissioners will face jail time over their recount effort amid Sen. Bob Casey refusing to concede the race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosecutors believe accused serial predators in violent sex assaults have no connection to each other
item.description: A $600,000 bond has been set for a man tied to sexual assaults and apartment break-ins over the last three months.
item.dc:creator: Brittany Taylor, Ninfa Saavedra, Corley Peel, KPRC 2

item.title: Amazon and Elon Musk's SpaceX challenge labor agency's constitutionality in federal court
item.description: Attorneys for Amazon and Elon Musk’s SpaceX argued in a federal appeals court Monday that the National Labor Relations Board’s structure is unconstitutional, advancing a legal fight that may last into the Trump administration where Musk is expected to oversee bureaucratic cost-cutting.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dems' Gaetz outrage follows long history of questionable DOJ acts under Biden
item.description: Criticisms have mounted that former Rep. Matt Gaetz as attorney general and would break norms, despite a list of questionable actions taken by DOJ under the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bolton: Moscow, Beijing should feel ‘a lot of relief’ if Gabbard is confirmed as DNI
item.description: Former national security adviser John Bolton said that Russia and China should feel “a lot of relief” if former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii) is confirmed as President-elect Trump’s choice for director of national intelligence. “She’s not capable of doing it,” Bolton said Sunday on CNN.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: GOP cries foul on Dem border spending bill they say would drag out migrant crisis
item.description: Appropriations Committee ranking member Susan Collins and other Republicans hit Democrats for advancing a "partisan" Homeland Security spending bill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senegal's governing party poised for parliamentary majority in boost for reform agenda
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Senegal's governing party is poised to win a parliamentary majority as main opposition leaders conceded defeat Monday in an election determining whether newly elected President Bassirou Diomaye Faye can carry out ambitious reforms he promised during his campaign.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump is creating team of loyalists after conflicts with Cabinet members in 1st term
item.description: In his second term, President-elect Donald Trump is surrounding himself with people who can amplify his message and agree with how he wants to remake the executive branch.
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro, MPR News

item.title: Trump tapping Noem to lead Homeland Security: Reports
item.description: Noem was first floated as a possible running mate for Trump, but her consideration fizzled after the release of her biography, in which she described killing a dog that was “untrainable.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, WGN 9

item.title: Speaker Mike Johnson: Republicans 'ready to deliver' on Trump's agenda
item.description: Congress returns to a changed Washington as President-elect Donald Trump’s hard-right agenda is quickly taking shape, buoyed by eager Republican allies eyeing a full sweep of power on Capitol Hill while Democrats are sorting out what went wrong.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro, WGN 9
